name: evo-cypress-e2e
description: Cypress e2e automation suite for evo.dev.theysaid.io with Mochawesome HTML reporting

scripts.test: rimraf cypress/reports || true; cypress run --reporter mochawesome --reporter-options reportDir=cypress/reports/mocha,overwrite=false,html=false,json=true
scripts.test:report: npm run test; npm run merge:report; npm run generate:report
scripts.generate:report: marge cypress/reports/mochawesome.json --reportDir cypress/reports --inline -t "EVO E2E Test Report" -p "evo-e2e-report"
